philosophy.notes: The page now uses the Cafe base as an editorial newsletter: warm paper, espresso ink, one yellow highlighter accent, hard rules, and flat cutout-style project clippings.

hierarchy.notes: The masthead, issue label, hero, intro note, project clippings, proof cards, and contact note create a clear reading path for employers and clients.

execution.notes: The design avoids gradients, blur, glass effects, floating decoration, and branded imitation. Visual interest comes from typography, paper composition, clipping shapes, and highlighter marks.

specificity.notes: Copy is plain English and CS-student specific. Projects show purpose, stack, review focus, and proof topics without fake testimonials or invented results.

restraint.notes: The page is more engaging than the plain version while staying controlled: one accent, flat colors, no purple-blue combo, no template filler, and no fake assets.
